MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHMIDT, HELMUT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-31-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-07-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 08 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

U.D. CASE P/T JUDGE PAUL CONROY, RPT. J. CHAN, CLK. R. CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. DENNIS A. ANTENORE DEFTS. IN PRO PER 2PM C/C FOR SETTL. CONF. DEFT. EDWARD CAINE PRESENT. DFET. ANDELL ALLEN NOT PRESENT. PLTF. WITH HIS ATTY. PRESENT. STIP. SETTL. FOR JUDGMNT:PLTF. TO HAVE IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF PREMISES. STAY TIL 9/15/94. PLTF. WAIVE RENT AND ATTY. FEES. JUDGMNT. MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH WITH WRIT. JUDGMNT. TO BE PREPARED BY PLTF. DO NOT VACATE TRIAL DATE AS TO DEFT. ANDELL ALLEN. SETTLMNT. YET MAY BE REACHED
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 08

JUDGE: CARLOS BAKER, JR, CLERK:E CLAVERIA (NO REPORTER) 10:15AM: CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PRESENT:PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL DENNIS ANTENORE, DEFENDANT ANDELL ALLEN NOT APPEARING. AS TO DEFT EDWARD CAINE, ON SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OF THIS CASE ON AUG. 31, 1994, MR. EDWARD CAINE WAS PRESENT AND ENTERED INTO STIPULATED JUDGMENT AGAINST HIM. CASE ON TRIAL TODAY IS AGAINST ANDELL ALLEN, FOR A DEFAULT JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES - THIS PRAYER WAS GRANTED BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAINE, EDWARD ALLEN, ANDELL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 586 HICKORY STREET,SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL SEP-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL DAMAGES AND BACK RENTS AND COSTS ON EDWARD CAINE, PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ON AUG.31, 1994; AS TO DEFT ANDELL ALLEN, DEFAULT JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION AND RESTITUTION OF PREMISES OF 586 HICKORY ST. SAN FRANCISCO, CA. (SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS)
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
